mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation WHERE 1 = 1 AND audit_model_number like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and is_deleted = 0
SELECT write_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND information_type = '审计模型部署' and delete_status = 1

SELECT a.*, b."def_exam_user" AS "def_exam_user" FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation a LEFT JOIN hpeapm.spl_model_type b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND a.is_deleted = 0

SELECT a.*, b."def_exam_user" AS def_exam_user FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info AS a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_model_type" b ON a."audit_model_number" = b."audit_model_number" WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.audit_model_number='%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber AS auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName AS auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber AS auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName AS auditModelName, _abc.dockPeople AS dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment AS dockDepartment, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess AS primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess AS secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.auditBusinessLogic, _abc.subordinateToSystem, _abc.modelCode, _abc.runningMode, _abc.auditModelDescribe, _abc.isOnline, _abc.isSyn, _abc.synUrl as synUrl, ba.assessmentResult, ba.modelAssessmentRemarks, ba.modelDevelopmentLogic, ba.stayDevelopmentContent, ba.progressTheDevelopment, ba.expectedCompletionTime, ba.conditionsStillLacking, ba.modelDevelopmentRemarks, ba.modelState, ba.modelingMethod as modelingMethod, _abc.remark AS remark, _abc.typeOfInformation, _abc.detailedTime, _abc.model_code_file_id AS model_code_file_id, _abc.off_model_library AS off_model_library, _abc.isShare as isShare, _abc.writeTime as writeTime FROM ( SELECT b.is_syn as isSyn, b.syn_url as synUrl, b.is_online as isOnline, b.audit_model_describe auditModelDescribe, b.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, b.subordinate_to_system AS subordinateToSystem, b.model_code AS modelCode, b.running_mode as runningMode, a.write_time as writeTime, b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.model_code_file_id AS model_code_file_id, b.off_model_library AS off_model_library, b.is_share as isShare, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time AS detailedTime FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type, type_of_information, detailed_time, write_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = '1'
AND dock_people = '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
AND information_type ='%'||#{informationType}||'%'
AND "is_import" = '%'||#{isImport}||'%' ) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, audit_business_logic, subordinate_to_system, model_code, audit_model_describe, is_online, is_syn, syn_url, model_code_file_id, off_model_library, is_share, running_mode FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%'||'%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
and secondary_business_process like '%'||'%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||'%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||'%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||'%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||'%'||#{auditModelName}||'%'||'%'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY detailedTime DESC ) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, assessment_result assessmentResult, model_assessment_remarks modelAssessmentRemarks, model_development_logic modelDevelopmentLogic, stay_development_content stayDevelopmentContent, progress_the_development progressTheDevelopment, expected_completion_time expectedCompletionTime, conditions_still_lacking conditionsStillLacking, model_development_remarks modelDevelopmentRemarks, model_state modelState, modeling_method as modelingMethod FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation WHERE 1=1 and is_deleted = 0
and assessment_result= '%'||#{assessmentResult}||'%'
and progress_the_development like '%'||#{progressTheDevelopment}||'%'
) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number ) a WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT _abc.auditModelNumber) as result FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, b.subordinate_to_system AS subordinateToSystem, b.model_code AS modelCode, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, a.detailed_time as detailedTime, b.remark remark FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, type_of_information, detailed_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE information_type = '审计模型部署' AND delete_status = '1'
AND dock_people = '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
AND "is_import" = '%'||#{isImport}||'%' ) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, audit_business_logic, subordinate_to_system, model_code, running_mode FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'
and secondary_business_process like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%' escape '|'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number
) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, assessment_result assessmentResult, model_assessment_remarks modelAssessmentRemarks, model_development_logic modelDevelopmentLogic, stay_development_content stayDevelopmentContent, progress_the_development progressTheDevelopment, expected_completion_time expectedCompletionTime, conditions_still_lacking conditionsStillLacking, model_development_remarks modelDevelopmentRemarks, model_state modelState FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation WHERE 1=1 and is_deleted ='0'
and assessment_result= '%'||#{assessmentResult}||'%'
and progress_the_development like '%'||#{progressTheDevelopment}||'%'
) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number ) a WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation
assessment_result, model_assessment_remarks, model_development_logic, stay_development_content, progress_the_development, expected_completion_time, conditions_still_lacking, model_development_remarks,
model_state, modeling_method, is_deleted, audit_model_number
like '%'||#{assessmentResult}||'%', like '%'||#{modelAssessmentRemarks}||'%', like '%'||#{modelDevelopmentLogic}||'%', like '%'||#{stayDevelopmentContent}||'%', like '%'||#{progressTheDevelopment}||'%', like '%'||#{expectedCompletionTime}||'%', like '%'||#{conditionsStillLacking}||'%', like '%'||#{modelDevelopmentRemarks}||'%',
like '%'||#{modelState}||'%', like '%'||#{modelingMethod}||'%', like '%'||#{isDeleted}||'%', like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation
assessment_result='%'||#{assessmentResult}||'%',
modeling_method='%'||#{modelingMethod}||'%',
model_assessment_remarks='%'||#{modelAssessmentRemarks}||'%',
model_development_logic='%'||#{modelDevelopmentLogic}||'%',
stay_development_content='%'||#{stayDevelopmentContent}||'%',
progress_the_development='%'||#{progressTheDevelopment}||'%',
expected_completion_time='%'||#{expectedCompletionTime}||'%',
conditions_still_lacking='%'||#{conditionsStillLacking}||'%',
model_development_remarks='%'||#{modelDevelopmentRemarks}||'%',
model_state='%'||#{modelState}||'%',
is_deleted='%'||#{isDeleted}||'%',
modeling_method='%'||#{modelingMethod}||'%',
audit_model_number='%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
where audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation set is_deleted = 1 where audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber AS auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName AS auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber AS auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName AS auditModelName, _abc.dockPeople AS dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment AS dockDepartment, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess AS primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess AS secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.auditBusinessLogic, _abc.subordinateToSystem, _abc.modelCode, _abc.isSyn, _abc.synUrl, _abc.offModelLibrary, _abc.auditModelDescribe, ba.assessmentResult, ba.modelAssessmentRemarks, ba.modelDevelopmentLogic, ba.stayDevelopmentContent, ba.progressTheDevelopment, ba.expectedCompletionTime, ba.conditionsStillLacking, ba.modelDevelopmentRemarks, ba.modelState, ba.modelingMethod modelingMethod, _abc.remark AS remark, _abc.typeOfInformation, _abc.detailedTime FROM ( SELECT b.audit_model_describe auditModelDescribe, b.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, b.subordinate_to_system AS subordinateToSystem, b.model_code AS modelCode, b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time AS detailedTime, b.is_syn as isSyn, b.syn_url as synUrl, b.off_model_library as offModelLibrary FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type, type_of_information, detailed_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type ='审计模型部署'
AND dock_people = '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
AND information_type ='%'||#{informationType}||'%'
AND "is_import" = '%'||#{isImport}||'%' ) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, audit_business_logic, subordinate_to_system, model_code, audit_model_describe, CASE WHEN off_model_library='O' THEN '' ELSE if( off_model_library='Y','是','否') END AS off_model_library, is_syn, syn_url FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'
and secondary_business_process like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY detailedTime DESC ) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, assessment_result assessmentResult, model_assessment_remarks modelAssessmentRemarks, model_development_logic modelDevelopmentLogic, stay_development_content stayDevelopmentContent, progress_the_development progressTheDevelopment, expected_completion_time expectedCompletionTime, conditions_still_lacking conditionsStillLacking, model_development_remarks modelDevelopmentRemarks, model_state modelState, modeling_method as modelingMethod FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation WHERE 1=1 and is_deleted = 0
and assessment_result= '%'||#{assessmentResult}||'%'
and progress_the_development like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{progressTheDevelopment}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number ) a WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_info" a SET a."offline" = '1' WHERE a."audit_model_number" = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_info" a SET a."offline" = '0' WHERE a."audit_model_number" = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select:
SELECT a."model_code" AS modelCode, a."model_code_file_id" AS modelCodeFileId, a."audit_model_name" AS auditModelName, a."audit_model_number" AS auditModelNumber FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" a
a."audit_model_number" IN
like '%'||#{item}||'%'
